summary: Complete testing of CyberDeck DJ Turntable v7 with expanded UI layout. All 19 frontend features and 14 backend API endpoints tested and verified working. UI fits in 1920x800 viewport without scrolling. New features (pad mode selectors, expanded loop controls, center mixer strip) all present and functional.
passed_tests: App loads without errors on https://turntable-pro-7.preview.emergentagent.com
Header shows CYBERDECK logo, REC button, STATIONS button
Two turntables with tonearms visible (DECK A cyan, DECK B red)
Spectrum visualizer visible between turntables with BASS/MID/HIGH labels
Crossfader visible below visualizer
Center mixer strip visible with MASTER VU meters
Center mixer has MSTR/BOOTH knobs
Center mixer has CH1/CH2 channel strips with TRIM/HI/MID/LOW knobs and channel faders
Deck A panel: DECK A label, NO SIGNAL text, waveform, CUE/PLAY/SYNC buttons
Deck B panel: DECK B label, NO SIGNAL text, waveform, CUE/PLAY/SYNC buttons
Pad mode selectors visible on Deck A: HOT CUE, BEAT LOOP, SLIP LOOP, BEAT JUMP
Pad mode selectors visible on Deck B: HOT CUE, BEAT LOOP, SLIP LOOP, BEAT JUMP
8 Hot Cue Pads (1-8) visible on Deck A
8 Hot Cue Pads (1-8) visible on Deck B
Loop controls with 1,2,4,8,16,32 buttons on Deck A
Loop controls with 1,2,4,8,16,32 buttons on Deck B
Pitch slider with lock button on each deck
FX RACK with ECHO, REVERB, FILTER, DRY/WET knobs on Deck A
FX RACK with ECHO, REVERB, FILTER, DRY/WET knobs on Deck B
No 0.00 or zero placeholders visible when no music is playing
All UI fits on one screen without scrolling (1920x800 viewport)
STATIONS button opens station browser with 30 stations
LOAD A STATION TO BEGIN button visible when no station loaded
Backend /api/proxy endpoint works
Play button disabled when no station loaded
Genre tabs (HIP HOP, R&B, TRAP, SOUL) all present in station browser
seed_data_creation: Test favorite stations created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features fully tested. Backend API uses Radio Browser external API for stations. Frontend uses Web Audio API for visualization. No database required for stations (fetched live from Radio Browser API). Favorites stored in MongoDB. New v7 features include: expanded turntables (190px), center mixer strip with CH1/CH2 channel strips, pad mode selectors (HOT CUE/BEAT LOOP/SLIP LOOP/BEAT JUMP), extended loop controls (1-2-4-8-16-32).
